title: TF2 Keras LSTM layer test fails with borderline numerical accuracy deviation
primary_error: AssertionError: Comparing with Framework failed: Max diff is 0.05215764045715332 (threshold: 5e-2)

failed_jobs.name: TensorFlow Layer Tests / TensorFlow Layer Tests

root_cause: Borderline numerical accuracy failure in TF2 Keras LSTM layer test. The max diff (0.0522) barely exceeds the 5e-2 tolerance for this LSTM variant (relu activation, tanh recurrent_activation, with dropout). This could be a flaky numerical precision issue from floating-point rounding in the LSTM computation path.
